events.title: NHS Birthday (UK)
events.summary: Commemorating the day the National Health Service was founded in 1948. It is a day of celebration for staff and patients across the UK to recognise the service's contribution to society.

events.title: Thank You Day
events.summary: A UK initiative started during the pandemic to encourage people to say thank you to their neighbours, local businesses, and community volunteers.

events.title: World Bikini Day
events.summary: A light-hearted anniversary of the day the bikini was first showcased in Paris in 1946, celebrating the history of swimwear and fashion evolution.
